concerns.text: SC-001 requires measuring model accuracy against a 'held-out test set' (R² ≥ 0.65), but no task in Phase 4 (T021-T027) implements a data split or holdout strategy. The tasks rely exclusively on 5-fold cross-validation metrics, leaving the primary success criterion unmeasurable.

FR-007 and SC-002 require calculating '95% Bootstrap Confidence Intervals on SHAP values' to determine statistical significance. Task T033 mentions calculating CIs but lacks explicit instruction to perform the bootstrap resampling methodology required. Task T032 covers Permutation Importance (a different test) but no task covers the specific bootstrap resampling for SHAP CIs.

FR-003 mandates calculating Volumetric Energy Density ($E_v$) only when scan_speed, hatch_spacing, and layer_thickness > 0. Task T014 mentions 'handling edge cases (division by zero)' but does not explicitly define the logic to filter rows or assign sentinel values as required by the spec's acceptance scenarios.

The spec's 'Edge Cases' section requires detecting and flagging a 'Degenerate Dataset' (zero porosity variance) with a specific error message. Task T015 mentions filtering rows with zero variance but lacks a distinct task to implement the detection logic and raise the specific 'Degenerate Dataset' flag/error.
